---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. I am frustrated because...)

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or configurations you've considered.

## Technical Details (Optional)
If you have implementation ideas, details of libraries, or architecture paths, list them here.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or visual mockups here.
